hero.title: Explore plans around adaptation and resilience
hero.notFoundExplanation: We may not have that location in our database, or it may not yet be connected to our disclosure data. Please try searching again.
hero.noDataBody: We don't yet have data to display for this location. We're continually expanding our coverage with historical disclosures and additional trusted data sources.

description.text: Browse local climate hazards, actions, and adaptation projects seeking funding from cities, states, and regions worldwide

noHazardsBanner.title: No hazards disclosed
noHazardsBanner.description:
This jurisdiction didn’t report any hazards on their CDP report.

To see more about what this jurisdiction reported, download the full questionnaire from the CDP open data portal.
noHazardsBanner.button: Visit the CDP Open Data Portal

noHazardsContent.title: {{location}} hasn't disclosed hazard information for their jurisdiction as of the {{year}} CDP disclosure
noHazardsContent.description:
Currently there isn’t any hazard information in the {{year}} CDP disclosure from {{location}}. There could be a few reasons for this, but for the sake of trust, accuracy and quality we aren’t showing other information.

As this project matures we are hoping to bring in previous years disclosures if they exist. We also want to apply methodologies and trusted external hazard data sources to compute hazards that could impact this location, as well as other locations globally. You can view other disclosed data for this location in the Government actions tab for goals, actions and other projects for {{location}}.

hazardDetail.requestersTooltip: These are organizations that have requested disclosure from this jurisdiction. This list is not exhaustive and does not indicate government compliance or the specific purpose for which information was disclosed.

hazardOverview.title: Hazard overview
hazardOverview.topHazardsTooltip: Hazards are ranked by how likely they are to occur and how severe their impact could be. This shows the top four — there may be other disclosed hazards not included in this list.
hazardOverview.mostExposedSectorsTooltip: Sectors are derived from disclosures and sorted by number of mentions or alphabetically. This reflects only what has been disclosed and does not indicate relative importance or completeness.

noGoals.title: Adaptation goals
noGoals.description: {{location}} didn’t disclose any hazard related adaptation goals in {{year}} in the CDP disclosure. There can be many reasons why the data hasn’t been disclosed, and ideally we would like to have them show up here.

noActions.title: Adaptation actions
noActions.description: {{location}} didn’t disclose any hazard related adaptation actions in {{year}} in the CDP disclosure. There could be any reason why we can’t display the data, but we hope to increase the data available over future and past years as we expand the capabilities of this product.

noProjects.title: Projects seeking funding
noProjects.description: {{location}} didn’t disclose any hazard related projects seeking funding in {{year}} in the CDP disclosure. Due to the lack of information we can’t provide any details or insights into funding gaps for {{location}}’s projects or progress in their process to obtain funding or manage these projects.

detail.totalCostTooltip: Total project cost and investment needed provided by discloser in selected currency, converted to USD by CDP.
detail.multipleTimeframesTooltip: This location disclosed multiple similar actions with multiple timeframes.

noSolutionsContent.title: {{location}} hasn't disclosed hazard information for their jurisdiction as of the {{year}} CDP disclosure
noSolutionsContent.description:
Currently there isn’t any hazard information in the {{year}} CDP disclosure from {{location}}. There could be a few reasons for this, but for the sake of trust, accuracy and quality we aren’t showing other information.

Since we don't have hazard data we can’t compute comparable locations that are affected by similar environmental hazards. What you could see here, and other locations in this product have solutions here, is a list of categories of solutions that are implemented other places around the world that share similar hazard profiles.

Solutions are categorized actions that could be applied at other locations around the world. Enabling users to look at their location and see what others are doing around the world that could be applied or implemented here.

emptyState.title: Ask a question about {{location}}.
